scripts.build: node ../../tools/run-with-platform-secrets.mjs --app myboat --environment prd --profile build -- sh -c 'nuxt build'
scripts.db:ready: pnpm run db:migrate && pnpm run db:seed
scripts.dev: sh -c 'if command -v doppler >/dev/null 2>&1; then doppler run -- pnpm run dev:inner; else pnpm run dev:inner; fi'
scripts.dev:inner: pnpm run db:ready && pnpm run dev:bindings && pnpm run dev:broker-port && pnpm run dev:port && pnpm exec concurrently -k -n broker,web -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:broker" "pnpm run dev:nuxt"
scripts.dev:nuxt: sh -c 'pnpm exec wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:8791/healthz && export MYBOAT_LOCAL_BROKER_ORIGIN=http://127.0.0.1:8791 && export PORT=${NUXT_PORT:-3000} && export NITRO_PORT=$PORT && export NUXT_PORT=$PORT && nuxt dev --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT'
scripts.dev:broker-port: REQUIRED_PORT=8791 REQUIRED_PORT_LABEL='Local broker port' pnpm exec tsx ../../tools/require-web-dev-port.ts
scripts.quality: echo 'Turbo dependsOn handles lint + typecheck + format:check'
scripts.db:seed: wrangler d1 execute myboat-db --local --file=node_modules/@narduk-enterprises/narduk-nuxt-template-layer/drizzle/seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute myboat-db --local --file=drizzle/seed.sql
scripts.db:reset: bash ../../tools/db-migrate.sh myboat-db --local --dir node_modules/@narduk-enterprises/narduk-nuxt-template-layer/drizzle --dir drizzle --reset && pnpm run db:seed
